ogTitle: Karaak Flat vs Karangi: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Karaak Flat and Karangi.
heading: Karaak Flat vs Karangi — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Karaak Flat, New South Wales and Karangi, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Karaak Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Karangi (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Karaak Flat or Karangi safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Karaak Flat has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Karangi scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Karaak Flat scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Karangi scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Karaak Flat or Karangi?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Karaak Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
